summary: Completed testing of critical backend fixes for asset data validation and forecast structure. All 3 reported issues have been successfully resolved and verified through both API and UI testing.
passed_tests: GET /api/ui/overview?asset=DXY&horizon=90 - Returns correct DXY asset with values ~117.99 (not SPX ~5000-6900)
GET /api/ui/overview?asset=BTC&horizon=90 - Returns correct BTC asset with 90 predicted points
Case-insensitive asset validation - 'btc' lowercase and 'DXY' uppercase both work
Frontend BTC Fractal page (/) - Expected Outcomes section displays correctly with BEAR/BASE/BULL scenarios
Frontend DXY page (/dxy) - Shows BEARISH USD verdict with -5.77% expected move and chart visualization
Frontend Overview page (/overview) - SPX chart displays with forecast line and correct price ranges
